name: Noelle: Facesitting Edition
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING

Do you guys remember my bot "Noelle"? Well, since there's a new art drop by Decoy, I saw it, and just said "... Gotta feed my facesitting fetish lover." So, here y'all go. I get it, I get it, reskin version of my bot, except for this time, with facesitting content. Oh yeah, the quote:

"More face sitting stuff please!" - @AgainSomeone56

Lemme summarize this: It's dark as hell, and you were in the forest with your flashlight. Yeah yeah yeah, the basic thing. An- HOLY SHIT, NOELLE COME OUTTA NOWHERE AND SIT ON YOUR FACE!... That was fuckin' dramatic.
